title: SetIODef Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub SetIODef (Type As SpelLabelTypes, Index As Integer, Label As String, Description As String)
parameters:
Type	Specifies the I/O type as shown below:

InputBit = 1, InputByte = 2, InputWord = 3

OutputBit = 4, OutputByte = 5, OutputWord = 6

MemoryBit = 7, MemoryByte = 8,MemoryWord = 9

Index	Specifies the bit or port number.

Label	Specifies the new label.

Description	Specifies the new description.
description: Sets the I/O name and description for one I/O point in the current project.
notes: Use SetIODef to define the label and description for any I/O point.
examples: Dim label, desc as String label = "StartCycle"
